mapper.select: SELECT OD.ID, OD.WAREHOUSE_OUT_ID, OD.MATERIAL_ID, OD.MATERIAL_CODE, OD.MATERIAL_NAME, OD.SPECIFICATION_MODEL, OD.BRAND, OD.UNIT_CODE, OD.UNIT_NAME, OD.WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL_ID, OD.OUT_QUANTITY, OD.FLOW_DIRECTION, OD.CREATE_BY, OD.CREATE_BY_NAME, OD.CREATE_TIME, OD.UPDATE_BY, OD.UPDATE_BY_NAME, OD.UPDATE_TIME, NVL(AD.APPLICATION_QUANTITY, 0) AS APPLICATION_QUANTITY, NVL(AD.OUT_QUANTITY_SUM, 0) AS OUT_QUANTITY_SUM, NVL(AD.APPLICATION_QUANTITY, 0) - NVL(AD.OUT_QUANTITY_SUM, 0) AS REMAINING_QUANTITY FROM E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL OD LEFT JOIN E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL AD ON OD.WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL_ID = AD.ID AND AD.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE OD.WAREHOUSE_OUT_ID = #{warehouseOutId} ORDER BY OD.CREATE_TIME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL ( ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION_MODEL, BRAND, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL_ID, OUT_QUANTITY, FLOW_DIRECTION, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warehouseOutId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{materialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseOutAppDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{outQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{flowDirection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

INSERT INTO E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL ( ID, WAREHOUSE_OUT_ID, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION_MODEL, BRAND, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL_ID, OUT_QUANTITY, FLOW_DIRECTION, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )
SELECT #{item.id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.warehouseOutId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.materialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.warehouseOutAppDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.outQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.flowDirection,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} FROM DUAL
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MAT_WAREHOUSE_OUT_DETAIL
WAREHOUSE_OUT_ID = #{warehouseOutId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MATERIAL_ID = #{materialId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MATERIAL_CODE = #{materialCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MATERIAL_NAME = #{materialName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SPECIFICATION_MODEL = #{specificationModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRAND = #{brand,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_CODE = #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_NAME = #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_OUT_APP_DETAIL_ID = #{warehouseOutAppDetailId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
OUT_QUANTITY = #{outQuantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
FLOW_DIRECTION = #{flowDirection,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
WHERE ID = #{id}
